title: Flux | Essential
description: Regularily maintained fabric-based FPS Boost modpack that changes nothing from vanilla.
body:
#  Flux is a regurarly maintained (for all versions) client-side modpack for optimising the game in all aspects.
This is a bare bones version of the pack, containing only the _essential_, optimising mods, changing nothing from the game.

 It contains mod like: Sodium, CCME, BadOptimizations, and many more.

If you have a lower-end laptop/computer, this is the perfect modpack for you.

 Check out the Extra version of the modpack for the full version.

**Enjoy using the pack <3**
